title: Hugo's Year at Forest School
synopsis: Follow Hugo through four seasons at his outdoor forest school, discovering how nature changes throughout the year while learning and playing with friends.

pages.text: Hugo loves his forest school! When spring arrives, everything is new and green. Tiny buds pop out on the tree branches. Hugo and his friends plant seeds in the garden.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes kneeling in a garden bed, planting seeds with small gardening tools. The forest school setting shows budding trees in soft spring pastels of pale green and pink. Other children work nearby in the background.
illustration.alt: Hugo planting seeds in spring garden

pages.text: The flowers bloom in pretty colors. Hugo watches butterflies dance from flower to flower. Baby birds chirp in their nests high up in the trees. Spring is full of new life!

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes pointing excitedly at colorful butterflies among blooming flowers. The scene uses spring pastels with soft pinks, yellows, and greens. Bird nests with baby birds are visible in tree branches above.
illustration.alt: Hugo watching butterflies and baby birds in spring

pages.text: Summer brings warm, sunny days! Hugo's plants have grown tall and strong. He picks ripe tomatoes and sweet berries with his teacher. The leaves on all the trees are big and green.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding a basket of red tomatoes and berries. The same forest school garden now shows fully grown plants in bright summer colors of deep greens, reds, and yellows. Lush, full tree canopies provide shade.
illustration.alt: Hugo harvesting vegetables and berries in summer

pages.text: Hugo splashes in the creek during water play time. He finds smooth stones and watches minnows swim. The summer sun feels warm on his face as he explores.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes crouched by a clear creek, holding smooth stones while small fish swim nearby. Bright summer sunshine filters through full green leaves. The water sparkles with vivid blues and the scene glows with warm, bright summer colors.
illustration.alt: Hugo playing by the creek in summer sunshine

pages.text: Autumn paints the forest in orange, red, and yellow! Hugo collects colorful leaves that have fallen to the ground. He helps gather the last vegetables before winter comes.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding an armful of colorful autumn leaves. The same forest school scene now shows trees with brilliant orange, red, and golden yellow foliage. Warm autumn colors dominate the landscape with fallen leaves scattered on the ground.

pages.text: Winter brings snow to forest school! Hugo builds a snowman and looks for animal tracks in the white snow. The trees rest quietly, waiting for spring to come again.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes building a snowman in the same forest school location, now covered in pristine white snow. The bare tree branches are outlined in cool winter blues and purples. Animal tracks dot the snowy ground, and the scene has a peaceful, quiet winter atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Hugo building a snowman in winter

pages.text: Hugo has learned so much through all four seasons! Spring will come again soon, and the wonderful cycle of nature will begin once more at his forest school.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes standing in the center of the forest school clearing, with the scene split into four quarters showing spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, and winter cool. Each season's trees and garden are visible, showing the complete yearly cycle.
illustration.alt: Hugo surrounded by all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Hugo plant in spring?
questions.explanation: Hugo plants seeds in the garden during spring at forest school.

questions.question: What does Hugo pick in summer?
questions.explanation: Hugo picks ripe tomatoes and berries from his garden in summer.

questions.question: What colors are the autumn leaves?
questions.explanation: Autumn leaves turn beautiful colors like orange, red, and yellow.

questions.question: What does Hugo build in winter?
questions.explanation: Hugo builds a snowman when winter brings snow to forest school.
